descriptors: I am a young nun who repudiated her vows out of love. I have always been able to see spirits, though my ability sometimes scares me.
agenda: Escape with Lorenzo to a place where we don't need to fear the Church's punishment

gifts.name: Spiritualist
gifts.description: Alizée can see and communicate with spirits. If anyone has been in contact with spirits in the past twenty-four hours, Alizée will sense the remaining spirit energy. With each use of this Gift, the young woman can obtain a single piece of information about the spirit aura she has perceived. The Spiritualist Gift can also be used to remove a Grudge Token from the Gift Mass of Restless Spirits.

system.background: A young nun who abandoned her religious vows for love of Lorenzo. Possesses the natural ability to see and communicate with spirits, though this gift sometimes frightens her. Hiding in the Cemetery of the Innocents to avoid the Church's severe judgment. Watches the Hunters from behind tombstones, ready to intervene to help Lorenzo. Will try not to reveal her abilities unless cornered. Can sense that spirits are very agitated due to both a powerful hateful spirit (Yvonne) and the imminent passage of the comet Morituris.
system.notes: Key to resolving the spirit problem. Her Spiritualist Gift can remove Grudge Tokens from the underground pit. Will help if Hunters protect her and Lorenzo's secret.

flags.inspiration: The Little Match Girl (Hans Christian Andersen)
